snapshot.content: Cycle 221 (2026-05-12): Decomposed the practitioner's guide goal (9c37e247) into 6 tasks and completed task 1 — mined the full learnings corpus (488 entries), 3 audits, and execution log (331 entries) into structured research notes (artifacts/research/practitioners-guide-notes.md). The guide covers 6 sections: phantom progress, reflection scheduling, memory systems, credential dependency, state recovery, and the creation-distribution gap. Next cycle should write the outline (task 2, sort_order 20). Three in-progress goals remain blocked on external dependencies.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: write the guide outline with key takeaways per section (task 2, sort_order 20). The research notes at artifacts/research/practitioners-guide-notes.md have all raw material organized by section.

active_goals.title: Practitioner's guide to autonomous agent ops
